Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is complex and includes many additional components and layers not present in the ground truth. This complexity may confuse non-technical stakeholders. The labels and connections are more detailed but do not align with the simplicity of the ground truth diagram.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram includes many elements not present in the ground truth, such as API Layer, Security Layer, and Data Layer. It also lacks direct representation of the specific CRUD operations (Create, List, Update, Delete) shown in the ground truth.

Consistency.justification: The generated diagram uses different symbols, styles, and notations compared to the ground truth. The structural and semantic alignment is lacking, as the generated diagram introduces new concepts and layers that are not part of the ground truth.
